summary: Policy engine hard-block evidence for Issue #39

body.name: evidence-hard-block-max-vcpu-1
body.description: Hard-block policy: reject any job requesting more than 1 vCPU

step_2_run_rejected.description: Submitted run requesting 5 total vCPU (driver=2, executor=2x2=4, but executor_count=2 maps differently). Hard-blocked with HTTP 422.

body.detail: Policy violation(s): [evidence-hard-block-max-vcpu-1] Requested vCPU (5) exceeds policy limit (1).

step_3_direct_engine_test.description: Direct policy_engine.evaluate_policies call confirming hard enforcement produces passed=False

result.remediation: Reduce total vCPU to 1 or less.

step_3_direct_engine_test.preflight_status_mapping: enforcement=hard AND passed=false -> preflight check status=fail (hard block)

step_4_cleanup.description: Test policies deleted after evidence capture

issue_39_acceptance_criteria_coverage.hard_block_policy_rejects_submission: PASS — HTTP 422 with policy name in error message
issue_39_acceptance_criteria_coverage.global_scope_policy: PASS — policy scope=global, applies to all environments
issue_39_acceptance_criteria_coverage.enforcement_hard_produces_fail_status: PASS — preflight maps hard enforcement + not passed -> status=fail
